UNLAWFUL DETAINER MOTION 501, PLAINTIFF RYAN HENDERSON'S MOTION FOR FURTHER SANCTIONS FOLLOWING FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH ORDER COMPELLING DISCOVERY IS GRANTED IN PART, AND DENIED IN PART. MOTION IS DENIED AS TO ISSUE SANCTIONS, MOTION IS GRANTED AS TO MONETARY SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $3,350. DEFENDANT'S COUNSEL ADMITS THAT HE FAILED TO COMPLY WITH THE COURT ORDER AND THAT HE DID NOT OBTAIN A STIPULATION OR COURT'S PERMISSION AND UNILATERALLY DECIDED ON PROVIDING COURT ORDERED RESPONSES 11 DAYS LATE AND ON THE EVE OF DISCOVERY CUT-OFF DATE. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II, CLERK: M. OLOPERNES, NOT REPORTED

Notice Of Motion To Have Discovery Motion Heard After The Close Of Discovery, To Compel, And For Sanctions For Discovery
Off Calendar May-10-2013 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-16-2013 Continued To Sep-23-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Further Sanctions Following Failure To Comply With Order Compelling Discovery
Off Calendar May-07-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: PLAINTIFF RYAN HENDERSON's Motion For Further Sanctions Following Failure To Comply With Order Compelling Discovery is GRANTED in part, and DENIED in part. Motion is DENIED as to issue sanctions, motion is GRANTED as to monetary sanctions in the amount of $3,350. Defendant's counsel admits that he failed to comply with the Court order and that he did not obtain a stipulation or Court's permission and unilaterally decided on providing Court ordered responses 11 days late and on the eve of discovery cut-off date. Judge A. James Robertson II, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not reported (D501)

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Further Responses And Admissions Deemed Admitted; Req For Sanctions
Off Calendar Apr-11-2013 Text Ruling

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-18-2013 Continued To Aug-20-13 At 08:30 A.M. In Dept 212

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Discovery Responses And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Mar-27-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Matthew Mellen, Esq. (650-638-0120) of Mellen Law Firm for RYAN HENDERSON,
plaintiff and moving party
Brian S. Wittemore, Esq. (415-398-3344) of Severson & Werson for Bank of America, N.A., defendant and opposing party

ARGUED - PLAINTIFF RYAN HENDERSON'S Motion To Compel Further Discovery Responses and for Monetary Sanctions. Per Court order, the parties meet and confer. Defendant agrees to submit materials requested. Court grants sanctions against defendant Bank of America, N.A. in the amount of $5,000. Prevailing party to submit a form of order in compliance with CRC 3.1312. Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay, Clerk L. Fong, Not Reported. (501)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-10-2012 Set For Trial On Feb-25-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-08-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances, Atty. Matthew Mellen of Mellen Law Firm (650-638-0120) appearing for plaintiff Ryan Henderson opposing party. No other appearance.

Tentative ruling is adopted, DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. A NATIONAL ASSOCIATION's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Sustained in part and overruled in part. Overruled as to 1st to 5th causes of action. Sustained without leave to amend as to 6th cause of action. Prevailing party prepare order. Judge A. James Roberson II, not reported. (501/AJR)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-08-2012 Continued To Jun-08-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, the court adopted its tentative ruling as follow: DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. A NATIONAL ASSOCIATION's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Continued to June 8, 2012. Opposing party to provide courtesy copy of opposition per San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B by May 18, 2012 4:00 PM. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, not reported. (501/REQ)
